author: mroguljic
body:
#### PR description:

This PR addresses issue https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/issues/51320. It adds `siPixelDigis` collection to select ALCARECO outputs, allowing pixel FedErrors to be properly handled when refitting.

#### PR validation:

The `edmEventSize` shows the added collections and their sizes (on a test `ALCARECOSiPixelCalSingleMuonTight` example). The three branches added with this change are marked with "\*\*line\*\*"

```
File alcareco_with_digi.root Events 178
Branch Name | Average Uncompressed Size (Bytes/Event) | Average Compressed Size (Bytes/Event) 
EventProductProvenance 4378.24 3313.46
recoTrackExtras_ALCARECOSiPixelCalSingleMuonTightTracksRefit__ALCARECO. 1166.19 944.433
**PixelFEDChanneledmNewDetSetVector_siPixelDigis__RECO. 11176.9 524.719**
recoTrackExtras_ALCARECOSiPixelCalSingleMuonTight__ALCARECO. 522.466 410.438
SiStripClusteredmNewDetSetVector_ALCARECOSiPixelCalSingleMuonTight__ALCARECO. 655.787 381.657
recoTracks_ALCARECOSiPixelCalSingleMuonTightTracksRefit__ALCARECO. 628.669 366.91
recoTracks_ALCARECOSiPixelCalSingleMuonTight__ALCARECO. 618.781 357.893
SiPixelClusteredmNewDetSetVector_ALCARECOSiPixelCalSingleMuonTight__ALCARECO. 407.809 272.225
SiPixelClusteredmNewDetSetVector_closebyPixelClusters__ALCARECO. 400.534 262.579
TrackingRecHitsOwned_ALCARECOSiPixelCalSingleMuonTightTracksRefit__ALCARECO. 1218.25 189.337
TrackingRecHitsOwned_ALCARECOSiPixelCalSingleMuonTight__ALCARECO. 1226.07 176.758
Phase2TrackerCluster1DedmNewDetSetVector_ALCARECOSiPixelCalSingleMuonTight__ALCARECO. 176.163 132.719
EventAuxiliary 129.281 64.1236
**DetIdedmEDCollection_siPixelDigis__RECO. 70.6517 45.6742**
**DetIdedmEDCollection_siPixelDigis_UserErrorModules_RECO. 48.5169 37.8539**
EventSelections 103.287 24.6404
floatsedmValueMap_trackDistances__ALCARECO. 73.3371 22.0562
ints_ALCARECOSiPixelCalSingleMuonTightTracksRefit__ALCARECO. 34.0225 17.5112
BranchListIndexes 25.6573 5.47191
```

A check was made by refitting the tracks using the new ALCARECO and confirming no significant changes. The number of  VALID / MISSING / INACTIVE tracking hits went from 3674 / 916 / 816 to 3677 / 915 / 815. 

`runTheMatrix` tests finished with 
```
42 37 36 31 22 1 1 1 1 1 1 tests passed, 12 4 0 0 0 0 0 0 0 0 0 failed
```
The failures seem to come from test files (temporarily?) not being available for reading. Presumably, the failures are not related to the PR.

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

To be backported to 17.0.X, 16.1.X, 16.0.X.
title: Store SiPixelDigi collections in AlCaRecos that store pixel clusters
